_description: Extended vocabulary for LLM labeling prompts. Includes the 15 DB communities plus adjacent/emerging clusters that help the LLM place accounts more precisely.
_usage: Loaded by label_tweets_ensemble.py build_prompt(). Gives the LLM a richer map of the TPOT space so new-community-signals are precise rather than noisy renames of existing communities.

established_communities._note: These 15 are in the DB. Use their short_names for bits tags.
established_communities.LLM-Whisperers: Obsessive LLM experimenters, prompt sorcerers, shamanic AI relationships. Treat models as cognitive entities.
established_communities.Qualia-Research: Consciousness geometry, qualia formalism, phenomenological self-experimentation. NOT general uses of 'mind' or 'brain'.
established_communities.AI-Safety: EA, forecasters, alignment researchers. Includes policy, governance, x-risk, institutional critique. Also covers 'alignment research' — do NOT create separate signal for that.
established_communities.Contemplative-Practitioners: Serious meditators, jhanas, IFS, somatic healing, breathwork, nondual awakening. Grounded in direct experience.
established_communities.highbies: High-agency weirdos, absurdist viral humor, niche obsessions, crowdsourcing life decisions. The humor IS the art form.
established_communities.Core-TPOT: The big tent: absurdist humor + personal essays + shitposting + divine absurdity. Requires the STYLE, not just proximity to TPOT. If the tweet could be from any smart person on Twitter, it's NOT Core-TPOT.
established_communities.AI-Creativity: AI as creative partner, generative art, synthetic personas, surreal digital rituals, agent-based performance art.
established_communities.Quiet-Creatives: Solitary writers, gentle pattern-noticers, reflective coding, personal creative output as daily practice. Stream-of-consciousness posting about daily life as genuine connection.
established_communities.Collective-Intelligence: DAO builders, regeneration, mycelial coordination, open-source ecologies. NOT the phrase 'collective intelligence' used casually.
established_communities.NYC-Institution-Builders: LITERAL NYC housing, schools, families, daily rituals. City of Yes housing reform, friend-cluster engineering. NOT abstract 'institutional design' or governance.
established_communities.Queer-TPOT: Queer technologists, identity as mutable media, xenocognitive identity shifts with frontier tech.
established_communities.Relational-Explorers: Human connection as sacred research. Dissecting gaps between what people say and mean. Codependency work, attachment theory, IFS applied to relationships.
established_communities.TfT-Coordination: Sensemaking tools, collective intelligence infrastructure, zero-friction shipping. HCI + DeSci + coordination stacks.
established_communities.Tech-Intellectuals: Bridge raw technical execution + deep systemic reflection. Ship infrastructure while diagnosing civilizational stagnation.
established_communities.Internet-Intellectuals: Thread essayists, cultural criticism, sharp synthesis, public intellectualism. Long-form Twitter threads as primary medium.

emerging_clusters._note: These are real scenes observed in labeling but not yet DB communities. Use new-community-signal:Name for these ONLY.
emerging_clusters.AI-Mystics: Bridges AI + mystical/spiritual tradition. Arabic poetry meets alignment, meditation-as-computation, Sufi + ML. 5 signals across manual labeling.
emerging_clusters.d/acc-Builders: Defensive acceleration (Vitalik's framework). Network states, Zuzalu ecosystem, zugrama.org. Build things that must exist. Proof of personhood, decentralized identity.
emerging_clusters.DeSci: Decentralized science. Open-source crowdsourcing AI swarms, science/acc, breaking existing research paradigms. Adjacent to d/acc but focused on scientific discovery.
emerging_clusters.Somatic-Coaching: Distinct from Contemplative-Practitioners. Body-oriented coaching, trauma-informed facilitation, nervous system regulation as professional practice (not personal exploration).
emerging_clusters.Metamodern-Integral: Hanzi Freinacht, metamodernism, integral theory, developmental psychology applied to culture. Overlaps with Collective-Intelligence but more philosophical.
emerging_clusters.Egregore-Trackers: People who track and name memetic entities, cultural forces, and emergent group minds. Simulacra theory, hyperstition, cultural virus dynamics.
emerging_clusters.Network-State: Balaji-adjacent. Startup societies, popup cities, charter cities. Overlaps with d/acc but more political/sovereign focus.
emerging_clusters.Post-Rationalist: Beyond LessWrong rationalism. Integrating embodiment, aesthetics, and spiritual practice with analytical rigor. The 'what rationalism becomes after you meditate' crowd.

adjacent_ecosystems._note: These are NOT TPOT communities. Accounts primarily in these spaces should get low/no bits. Useful for understanding what TPOT is NOT.
adjacent_ecosystems.Mainstream-AI-Twitter: Corporate AI Twitter. Product launches, benchmark comparisons, career advice. Not TPOT even if they discuss AI.
adjacent_ecosystems.Crypto-Finance: DeFi, trading, token launches. Not TPOT unless they also bridge into coordination/philosophy.
adjacent_ecosystems.Mainstream-Rationalist: LessWrong/EA institutional accounts. TPOT-adjacent but distinct culture.
adjacent_ecosystems.Indian-Intellectual-Twitter: Indian political/cultural commentary. Some TPOT members are Indian but the community itself is distinct.
adjacent_ecosystems.Wellness-Influencer: Mainstream wellness content. Distinct from Contemplative-Practitioners (who have analytical rigor) and Somatic-Coaching (who have professional depth).
